requirement_topic.en: EMC and Electromagnetic Disturbance Evidence — IEC/ASEAN-Based Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容及电磁骚扰证据——基于IEC/东盟采标的接受路径
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容及電磁騷擾證據——基於IEC/東盟採標的接受路徑

summary.en: Laos generally builds regulated electrical-product assessment around DOSM conformity control and standards adopted from IEC or ASEAN practice. For a household refrigerator, the importer should keep EMC evidence covering conducted and radiated disturbance from the compressor, inverter drive if present, thermostat or electronic controller, and power-supply circuits. Laos should not be treated as having an EU-style CE EMC Directive route; instead, exporters should map IEC CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 or equivalent ASEAN-adopted evidence into the DOSM/importer technical file and confirm whether the current regulated-goods list requires local certificate review before sale.
summary.zh: 老挝通常围绕DOSM合格控制以及采纳IEC或东盟实践的标准，对受规管电气产品进行评定。对于家用电冰箱，进口商应保存电磁兼容证据，覆盖压缩机、如有的变频驱动、温控器或电子控制器以及电源电路的传导和辐射骚扰。老挝不应被视为采用欧盟式CE EMC指令路径；出口商应把IEC CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2或等效东盟采标证据映射进DOSM/进口商技术文件，并确认现行受规管货物清单是否要求销售前本地证书审查。
summary.zht: 寮國通常圍繞DOSM合格控制以及採納IEC或東盟實踐的標準，對受規管電氣產品進行評定。對於家用電冰箱，進口商應保存電磁相容證據，覆蓋壓縮機、如有的變頻驅動、溫控器或電子控制器以及電源電路的傳導和輻射騷擾。寮國不應被視為採用歐盟式CE EMC指令路徑；出口商應把IEC CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2或等效東盟採標證據映射進DOSM/進口商技術文件，並確認現行受規管貨物清單是否要求銷售前本地證書審查。

standards_or_laws: DOSM regulated-goods conformity certification framework for electrical products
IEC CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 — electromagnetic compatibility requirements for household appliances, where adopted or referenced
ASEAN harmonised electrical and electronic equipment standards practice, where adopted by Laos

summary.en: China refrigerator compliance commonly relies on GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2 EMC evidence alongside GB 4706.13 safety and GB 12021.2 energy performance, with CCC where applicable. The Chinese EMC reports may be useful technical evidence because the GB 4343 series is aligned with CISPR household-appliance EMC concepts, but China reports and the CCC mark do not replace any Laos DOSM conformity or importer-held documentation requirement.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱合规通常依托GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2电磁兼容证据，并配合GB 4706.13安全和GB 12021.2能效要求，适用时还需CCC。由于GB 4343系列与CISPR家电电磁兼容概念对齐，中国EMC报告可作为有用技术证据，但中国报告和CCC标志不能替代老挝DOSM合格或进口商持有文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱合規通常依託GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2電磁相容證據，並配合GB 4706.13安全和GB 12021.2能效要求，適用時還需CCC。由於GB 4343系列與CISPR家電電磁相容概念對齊，中國EMC報告可作為有用技術證據，但中國報告和CCC標誌不能替代寮國DOSM合格或進口商持有文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2 — EMC requirements for household appliances
GB 4706.13 / GB 12021.2 baseline for China household refrigerators

gap.en: The main gap is documentary and national-scheme acceptance: China EMC reports can support the Laos file, but Laos importers should confirm the DOSM route and any local certificate, label, or Lao-language file expectations. Do not rely on an EU CE EMC declaration or China CCC mark as a Laos substitute.
gap.zh: 主要差距在于文件和国家制度接受性：中国EMC报告可支持老挝文件，但老挝进口商应确认DOSM路径以及任何本地证书、标签或老挝语文件预期。不得把欧盟CE EMC声明或中国CCC标志当作老挝替代证明。
gap.zht: 主要差距在於文件和國家制度接受性：中國EMC報告可支持寮國文件，但寮國進口商應確認DOSM路徑以及任何本地證書、標籤或寮國語文件預期。不得把歐盟CE EMC聲明或中國CCC標誌當作寮國替代證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the refrigerator is within DOSM regulated electrical goods; EMC evidence should be held in the importer technical file and checked against the applicable Laos-adopted IEC/ASEAN standard route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under China household-appliance EMC and CCC practice where applicable

source.publisher: Department of Standards and Metrology, Ministry of Industry and Commerce, Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EMC as part of the Laos DOSM/importer technical file, using IEC/CISPR or ASEAN-aligned evidence where accepted. Chinese GB 4343 reports may support the file, but CCC or CE EMC paperwork is not a stand-alone Laos market-access substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应把电磁兼容作为老挝DOSM/进口商技术文件的一部分，在可接受时使用IEC/CISPR或东盟对齐证据。中国GB 4343报告可支持文件，但CCC或CE EMC文件不是老挝市场准入的独立替代证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應把電磁相容作為寮國DOSM/進口商技術文件的一部分，在可接受時使用IEC/CISPR或東盟對齊證據。中國GB 4343報告可支持文件，但CCC或CE EMC文件不是寮國市場准入的獨立替代證明。
